items.title: S01E01 - Shakedown
items.summary: Blackmailers target homosexuals after an apparent suicide.

infolabels.title: Shakedown
infolabels.plot: Blackmailers target homosexuals after an apparent suicide.

items.title: S01E02 - Fingerman
items.summary: Ward receives a phone call from a distraught informer who believes he's being followed by associates of someone he helped put in jail.

infolabels.title: Fingerman
infolabels.plot: Ward receives a phone call from a distraught informer who believes he's being followed by associates of someone he helped put in jail.

items.title: S01E03 - The Screaming Woman
items.summary: Corso is suspended after being accused of rape by a woman who initially called the police regarding rowdy drunks disturbing the peace.

infolabels.title: The Screaming Woman
infolabels.plot: Corso is suspended after being accused of rape by a woman who initially called the police regarding rowdy drunks disturbing the peace.

items.title: S01E04 - Fast Gun
items.summary: A veteran who likes to draw his weapon on cops has robbed a bank. Instead of fleeing with his loot, he ambushes Corso and another officer, and then decides to attract police to a local bar so that he can kill as many of them as possible.

infolabels.title: Fast Gun
infolabels.plot: A veteran who likes to draw his weapon on cops has robbed a bank. Instead of fleeing with his loot, he ambushes Corso and another officer, and then decides to attract police to a local bar so that he can kill as many of them as possible.

items.title: S01E05 - Walking Target
items.summary: A sniper targets a foreign police official

infolabels.title: Walking Target
infolabels.plot: A sniper targets a foreign police official

items.title: S01E06 - Money Man
items.summary: Detectives Ward and Corso go underground in the building trade after several workers are injured in accidents. They discover a loan shark played by Charles Grodin who works for his uncle, Vincent Gardenia.

infolabels.title: Money Man
infolabels.plot: Detectives Ward and Corso go underground in the building trade after several workers are injured in accidents. They discover a loan shark played by Charles Grodin who works for his uncle, Vincent Gardenia.

items.title: S01E07 - Old Gangsters Never Die
items.summary: Elderly Salva Dimitchik claims he is no longer a mobster but Detective Haines is skeptical. A rash of truck hijackings are his old gang's specialty.

infolabels.title: Old Gangsters Never Die
infolabels.plot: Elderly Salva Dimitchik claims he is no longer a mobster but Detective Haines is skeptical. A rash of truck hijackings are his old gang's specialty.

items.title: S01E08 - To Catch a Hero
items.summary: A Vietnam veteran plays cat and mouse with the police by using his military training. Detectives Corso, Haines, and Ward are determined to bring the killer to justice.

infolabels.title: To Catch a Hero
infolabels.plot: A Vietnam veteran plays cat and mouse with the police by using his military training. Detectives Corso, Haines, and Ward are determined to bring the killer to justice.

items.title: S01E09 - Murder for Infinity
items.summary: Doyle, a newscaster, risks his life and puts himself at odds with the police when he tries to interview an escaped killer Stryker. Haines and Corso must get to the murderer first.

infolabels.title: Murder for Infinity
infolabels.plot: Doyle, a newscaster, risks his life and puts himself at odds with the police when he tries to interview an escaped killer Stryker. Haines and Corso must get to the murderer first.

items.title: S01E10 - The Pink Gumdrop
items.summary: Detectives Ward and Corso stakeout a bar known as a front for car theft. A sexy, woman Corso is helping to go straight leads them to the ringleader.

infolabels.title: The Pink Gumdrop
infolabels.plot: Detectives Ward and Corso stakeout a bar known as a front for car theft. A sexy, woman Corso is helping to go straight leads them to the ringleader.

items.title: S01E11 - The Witness
items.summary: Haines and Corso pull out all the stops to clear Ward, who is suspected of mob affiliation.

infolabels.title: The Witness
infolabels.plot: Haines and Corso pull out all the stops to clear Ward, who is suspected of mob affiliation.

items.title: S01E12 - The Boy Witness
items.summary: A 13 year old witnesses a woman's murder.

infolabels.title: The Boy Witness
infolabels.plot: A 13 year old witnesses a woman's murder.

items.title: S01E13 - Joshua Fit the Battle of Fulton Street
items.summary: A vigilante society is formed by neighborhood residents.

infolabels.title: Joshua Fit the Battle of Fulton Street
infolabels.plot: A vigilante society is formed by neighborhood residents.

items.title: S01E14 - The Bomber
items.summary: Detective Ward lays unconscious from an explosion at an embassy. His co-workers focus on a likely female prospect leaving the true culprit planning his next attack.

infolabels.title: The Bomber
infolabels.plot: Detective Ward lays unconscious from an explosion at an embassy. His co-workers focus on a likely female prospect leaving the true culprit planning his next attack.

items.title: S01E15 - Wire Finish
items.summary: Haines and Ward investigate why a jockey is getting bizarre late night phone calls. In an unusual twist they begin to suspect that it might be tied to the recent killings of two priests.

infolabels.title: Wire Finish
infolabels.plot: Haines and Ward investigate why a jockey is getting bizarre late night phone calls. In an unusual twist they begin to suspect that it might be tied to the recent killings of two priests.

items.title: S01E16 - Cruise to Oblivion
items.summary: Haines receives a tip about drugs being smuggled in to New York via a passenger ship, but a search of the suspect's luggage proves fruitless. However, diligent surveillance work by Corso and Ward confirms a potential drug deal.

infolabels.title: Cruise to Oblivion
infolabels.plot: Haines receives a tip about drugs being smuggled in to New York via a passenger ship, but a search of the suspect's luggage proves fruitless. However, diligent surveillance work by Corso and Ward confirms a potential drug deal.

items.title: S01E17 - The Patriots
items.summary: The wife of an exiled Latin American leader is murdered.

infolabels.title: The Patriots
infolabels.plot: The wife of an exiled Latin American leader is murdered.

items.title: S01E18 - Red Headed Pigeon
items.summary: The squad recruits a police woman to act as a decoy to help them capture a serial rapist. Even though she fits the criminal's "type," the officer seems to be striking out in her efforts.

infolabels.title: Red Headed Pigeon
infolabels.plot: The squad recruits a police woman to act as a decoy to help them capture a serial rapist. Even though she fits the criminal's "type," the officer seems to be striking out in her efforts.

items.title: S01E19 - Which Side Are You On?
items.summary: Detective Ward returns to his old neighborhood to conduct his own investigation into the murder of Mr. Gabriel, a high school teacher and mentor who was influential in guiding Ward away from a potential life of crime.

infolabels.title: Which Side Are You On?
infolabels.plot: Detective Ward returns to his old neighborhood to conduct his own investigation into the murder of Mr. Gabriel, a high school teacher and mentor who was influential in guiding Ward away from a potential life of crime.
